NONE DESERVE TO BE WORSHIPPED
EXCEPT ALLAH

THE TRUE ONE GOD AND
TO HIM ALONE WE ALL SUBMIT

NONE DESERVE TO BE WORSHIPPED
EXCEPT ALLAH
AND WE DO NOT WORSHIP ANYONE OR ANYTHING OTHER THAN HIM
BEING SINCERE IN OUR FAITH TO HIM

EVEN THOUGH THE POLYTHEISTS
DETEST THIS!

NONE DESERVE TO BE WORSHIPPED
EXCEPT ALLAH
OUR PROVIDER AND THE PROVIDER OF OUR FORE-FATHERS

NONE DESERVE TO BE WORSHIPPED
EXCEPT ALLAH
THE ONE, THE ONE, THE ONE
THE ONE WHO KEEPS HIS PROMISE
AND HELPED / HELPS HIS SERVANT
AND GRANTED ESTEEM TO HIS ARMY
AND WHO LEFT THE OTHER PARTIES ALONE AND ABONDONED (THEM)

SO THEN TO HIM BELONGS
THE KINGDOM  AND TO HIM BELONGS THE PRAISE
HE GIVES LIFE AND CAUSES TO DIE

AND HE CAUSES TO DIE AND
HE GIVES LIFE

AND HE IS THE EVER LIVING AND
SHALL NEVER DIE
AND HIS POWER IS THE GOODNESS
AND HE HAS POWER OVER ALL THINGS
Ya Aliyu Ya Azeem
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: يَا عَلِيُّ يَا عَظِيمُ،  يَا غَفُورُ يَا رَحِيمُ،
english translation text: O Elevated, O Mighty, O Forgiver, O Merciful.

arabic text: أَنْتَ الرَّبُّ الْعَظِيمُ الَّذِي لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ شَيْءٌ
english translation text: You are the Mighty Lord, nothing is of comparison to Him.
And He is the All-­Hearing, the All-­Seeing.

arabic text: وَهذَا شَهْرٌ عَظَّمْتَهُ وَكَرَّمْتَهُ وَشَرَّفْتَهُ وَفَضَّلْتَهُ عَلَى الشُّهُورِ،
english translation text: This is a month which You have exalted, honored, preferred and excelled over all other months.

arabic text: وَهُوَ الشَّهْرُ الَّذِي فَرَضْتَ صِيَامَهُ عَلَيَّ،
english translation text: It is the month in which You have made fasting obligatory on me,

arabic text: وَهُوَ شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ الْقُرْآنَ
english translation text: and it is the month of Ramadhan, in which You sent down the Qur’an,

arabic text: هُدَىً لِلنَّاسِ وَبَيِّنَاتٍ مِنَ الْهُدَى وَالْفُرْقَانِ
english translation text: a guidance for mankind, In it are clear signs of guidance and distinction. (2:185)
You have placed in it the night of Ordinance,
and made it better than a thousand months. (97:2)

arabic text: فَيَا ذَا الْمَنِّ وَلا يُمَنُّ عَلَيْكَ
english translation text:
O One who favours,
and none favours You,

arabic text: مُنَّ عَلَيَّ بِفَكَاكِ رَقَبَتِي مِنَ النَّارِ فِي مَنْ تَمُنُّ عَلَيْهِ
english translation text: favour me by saving me from the fire, amongst the ones whom You favour,

arabic text: وَأَدْخِلْنِي الْجَنَّةَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
english translation text: and make me enter Heaven by Your mercy, O the most Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate
Praise belongs to ALLAH,
the First before the bringing forth and the giving of life,
and the Last after the annihilation of all things,
the All-knowing who
forgets not him who remembers Him,
decreases not him who thanks Him,
disappoints not him who supplicates Him,
and cuts not off the hope of him who hopes in Him!

arabic text: أَللَّهُمَّ إنِّي أُشْهِدُكَ وَكَفى بِكَ شَهِيداً،
english translation text: O ALLAH, I call Thee to witness and Thou art sufficient witness…
...I call to witness all Thy angels,
the inhabitants of Thy heavens, the bearers of Thy Throne,
Thy prophets and Thy messengers whom Thou hast sent out,
and the various kinds of creatures Thou hast brought forth,

arabic text: أَنِّي أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لا إلهَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ
english translation text: that I bear witness that Thou art ALLAH; there is no god but Thou,
Thou alone, who hast no associate nor any equal,

arabic text: وَلا عَدِيلَ وَلا خُلْفَ لِقَوْلِكَ وَلا تَبْدِيْلَ
english translation text: and Thy word has no failing, nor any change;

arabic text: وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وآلِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُولُكَ،
english translation text: and that MUHAMMAD (ALLAH bless him and his Household) is Thy servant and Thy messenger;
he delivered to the servants that with which Thou charged him,

arabic text: وَجاهَدَ فِي اللَّهِ (عَزَّوَجَلَ خَ لَ) حَقَّ الْجِهادِ،
english translation text: he struggled for ALLAH as is His due,

arabic text: وَأَنَّهُ بَشَّرَ بِما هُوَ حَقٌّ مِنَ الثَّوابِ،
english translation text: he gave the good news of the truth of reward,

arabic text: وَأَنْذَرَ بِما هُوَ صِدْقٌ مِنَ الْعِقابِ.
english translation text: and he warned of the veracity of punishment.

arabic text: أَللَّهُمَّ ثَبِّتْنِي عَلى دِينِكَ ما أَحْيَيْتَنِي،
english translation text: O Allah, make me firm in Thy religion as long as Thou keepest me alive,

arabic text: وَلا تُزِغْ قَلْبِي بَعْدَ إذْ هَدَيْتَنِي،
english translation text: make not my heart to swerve after Thou hast guided me,

arabic text: وَهَبْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَة إنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ،
english translation text: and give me mercy from Thee, surely Thou art the Giver.
Bless MUHAMMAD and the Household of MUHAMMAD,

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ أَتْباعِهِ وَشِيعَتِهِ وَاحْشُرْنِي فِي زُمْرَتِهِ
english translation text: make me one of his followers and his partisans, muster me in his band,
and give me the success of accomplishing the obligatory observance of Friday,

arabic text: وَما أَوْجَبْتَ عَلَيَّ فِيها مِنَ الطَّاعاتِ،
english translation text: performing the acts of obedience which Thou has made incumbent upon me within it,

arabic text: وَقَسَمْتَ لِاَهْلِها مِنَ الْعَطآءِ فِي يَوْمِ الْجَزآءِ،
english translation text: [receiving] the bestowal which Thou hast apportioned for its people on the Day of Recompense!
Surely Thou art Might wise!

In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ فِي اَرْضِهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O argument of Allah in His lands!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَيْنَ ٱللَّهِ فِي خَلْقِهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O sight of Allah on His creatures!
Peace be upon you, O light of Allah
by which those who have been guided [to the true guidance] are guided
and by which the believers are relieved!
Peace be upon you, O polite and fearful!
Peace be upon you, O sincere patron!
Peace be upon you, O ark of salvation!
Peace be upon you, O essence of life!
Peace be upon you.
May Allah send blessings to you
and upon your Household,
the pure and immaculate.
Peace be upon you.
May Allah hasten that which He has promised you;
namely, victory and prevalence of your authority.
Peace be upon you, O my master.
I am a servant of you
and I recognize the first and the last of your affair.

arabic text: اَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ بِكَ وَبِآلِ بَيْتِكَ
english translation text: I seek nearness to Allah, the Exalted, through your Household and you

arabic text: وَاَنْتَظِرُ ظُهُورَكَ وَظُهُورَ ٱلْحَقِّ عَلَىٰ يَدَيْكَ
english translation text: and I am expecting your advent and the prevalence of the truth at your hands.

arabic text: وَاَسْاَلُ ٱللَّهَ اَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: And I beseech Allah to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
and to include me with those who are expecting you,
those who follow you and support you against your enemies,

arabic text: وَٱلْمُسْتَشْهَدِينَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ فِي جُمْلَةِ اَوْلِيَائِكَ
english translation text: and those who will be martyred in front of you in the group of your loyalists.
O my master, O Patron of the Age!
May Allah’s blessings be upon you
and upon your Household.
Today is Friday,
which is your day on which your advent is expected
to bring about relief to the believers at your hands,
and with one strike shall put an end to the intrigues of the infidels

arabic text: وَاَنَا يَا مَوْلاَيَ فِيهِ ضَيْفُكَ وَجَارُكَ
english translation text: On this day, O my master, I am your guest and in your vicinity

arabic text: وَاَنْتَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ كَرِيمٌ مِنْ اَوْلاَدِ ٱلْكِرَامِ
english translation text: and you, my master, are generous and the descendant of the generous people,
and you are commanded to receive your guests and neighbors hospitably;
so, receive me as your guest and neighbor.
May Allah’s blessings be upon you
and upon your Household, the immaculate.
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللّهُمَّ كُنْ لِوَلِيِّكَ الْحُجَّةِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ
english translation text: O Allah, Be for Your deputy the Hujjat, son of Hassan

arabic text: صَلَواتُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلى آبائِهِ,في هذِهِ السّاعَةِ وَفي كُلِّ ساعَةٍ
english translation text: may Your blessings be upon him and his forefathers now and at all times
a guardian, a protector, a leader, a helper, a proof and an eye.
until You make him live on the earth, in obedience (to You),
and cause him to live in it for a long time.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
